notes: A focused 185-line glue file that instantiates the general `comap_pointValuation_isog_eq_affine` engine at the concrete base-changed `1−π`. The hub lemma `omegaPullbackCoeff_oneSubFrobeniusIsogBaseChange_eq_one` (omega-coefficient value transport = 1) eliminates all previously sorry-tainted inputs and is reused in `OneSubAffineResidues.lean`. `OneSubAffineResidues` is an explicitly parked residual `Prop`-def whose discharge lives in a separate file; the assembly theorem `comap_pointValuation_oneSub_eq_affine_of_residues` is dead code within this file but is superseded (not duplicated) by the unconditional version in `OneSubAffineResidues.lean`.
